briefing.headline: Vertical and precise — pre-spawn muddy conditions call for reaction baits on deep structure.
briefing.gameplan:
In pre-spawn with muddy water and post frontal conditions, reaction presentations shine.

Wheeler: Aggressively snaps the Jigging Rap 4-5 feet above grouped-up bass to force committed fish to swim up; when they reach the bait and you stop it, it glides naturally downward and that's when you get bit.

Key adjustment for post frontal: slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Aggressively snaps the Jigging Rap 4-5 feet above grouped-up bass to force committed fish to swim up; when they reach the bait and you stop it, it glides naturally downward and that's when yo
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Match the conditions — slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, creek channel. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: 'Rising water — bass push shallow and spread out. Best spring days can occur when warming water rises fast. Key on runoff areas: backs of creeks, culverts, residential yards, city street drainage. Water temp can vary 5 degrees between pockets...

Palaniuk: 'The spot had a riprap bank with a steep drop, then a trough that came up onto a hard bottom ridge, tapered back off into another trough. The trough made a horseshoe. A 40-yard section where the fish wanted to live, with a 25-foot hole t...

Wheeler: On flat fisheries bass stay in the shallow zone a long time before spawning, but on highland reservoirs they may stage in 6-10 feet before moving up; crankbait selection should match the lake type and depth zone.

briefing.depthStrategy: Post-frontal pre-spawn fish pull back to 6-12ft staging areas. They won't commit shallow after the front. Target the first breakline off spawning flats and key on deeper structure near shallow spawning zones.
adjustIf: If skies cloud up and wind picks up, re-introduce moving baits — the reprieve from high pressure activates fish
If you find a cleaner pocket or tributary, switch to natural presentations — fish in cleaner water see more lures
